title: Senior Data Engineer
description: Build and maintain data pipelines using Python, Spark, and Airflow. Requires 5+ years experience with large-scale data processing.

title: ML Engineer
description: Design and deploy machine learning models in production. Experience with PyTorch, MLflow, and Kubernetes required.

title: Backend Developer
description: Develop REST APIs with FastAPI and PostgreSQL. Must have experience with Docker and CI/CD pipelines.

title: Data Analyst
description: Analyze financial datasets and create dashboards. SQL and Python required along with Tableau experience.

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Manage cloud infrastructure on AWS. Terraform and Kubernetes expertise needed for multi-region deployments.
